title: poa × limosa
intro: Poa × limosa, also known as limosa meadow-grass, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Poa × limosa include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
